name: a detector-less rule with no scope glob is enforced universally on any file, never silently skipped
command: printf '%s\n' 'rules:' '  - id: scraped-no-secret' '    description: "code must not embed plaintext cloud access keys"' '    severity: P0' '    mode: forbid' '    token: "AKIA"' '    enforced_by: [{tool: gitleaks}]' > s.yaml && printf 'token = AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE\n' > random.conf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file random.conf --extra-rules s.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'rule=scraped-no-secret severity=P0 detector=prose-judge.sh verdict=fail' e.txt && echo no-scope-applies-universally 1>&2
